text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, hearing that from you two really makes me
feel like a proper Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying? Of course you're a proper
member of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You gotta own it—let everybody
know you're a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I should own it? I never really saw it that way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Guess I better start saying stuff like, "There's no
better cure for fatigue than sweets," or "I wanna
fall in love like the heroine of a romance manga!"

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
That has nothing to do with being a Mejiro!
That's not what being a Mejiro's about!
